modules.name: Day 1 — Design, AI Workflows, & TDD Foundations
modules.description: Greenfield development: requirements, AI-assisted design, TDD, implementation sprint, and controlled deployment.

lessons.title: Course Introduction: Framing & Engineering Expectations
topics: 3 core scenarios: Greenfield, Existing Codebase Repair, Hybrid

lessons.title: Module 1: Requirements & Architecture (Greenfield Scenario)
topics: Validate AI output against security and system constraints

lessons.title: Module 2: AI-Assisted Design to Test Planning
topics: Write test plan BEFORE finalizing logic
Unit tests, edge case tests, failure case tests (pytest/unittest)

lessons.title: Module 3: Implementation Sprint
topics: Code review checkpoints, prompt quality review

lessons.title: Module 4: Controlled Deployment Simulation
topics: Pull request submission, peer code review
Validate tests pass, no regressions, no security issues

modules.name: Day 2 — Existing Systems, Debugging & Safe Modification
modules.description: Legacy code repair: reading architecture, bug fixing, CI/CD awareness, final deployment, and engineering review.

lessons.title: Day 2 Intro: Reset & Scenario Shift
topics: Must add feature without breaking downstream systems

lessons.title: Module 5: Reading Architecture & Legacy Code
topics: Interpret architecture diagrams, review logs, examine change history
AI to explain code sections — cross-check against actual behavior

lessons.title: Module 6: Bug Fix & Feature Extension
topics: Root cause identification, write failing test first
Minimal fix, add new feature safely
Regression protection, defensive programming, exception handling

lessons.title: Module 7: DevOps & CI/CD Awareness
topics: Python changes impact on automation, security scans, deployment

lessons.title: Module 8: Final Deployment & System Integrity Test + Review
topics: Full test suite, coverage review, no downstream breakage
Team presentations: architecture, AI strategy, validation, regression prevention

assessment.title: Final Engineering Review & Assessment
items: Team presentation: architecture decision and AI prompting strategy
Where AI failed and how teams validated safety
Instructor rubric: code quality, prompt quality, communication, safety awareness, TDD discipline
